title: How to see timetracking totals by date period
excerpt:

posts.author: JakeT (Jake)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m sure this is incredibly simple, but I just can’t seem to find it!

I need to see the time tracking reporting, over a particular date. The filter doesn’t seem to let me choose anything other than the duration of the time tracked.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Jake! Let us know if you still need assistance with this at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to help!
